name: Gubana
recipeIngredient: 1/4 Cup semi-sweet chocolate pieces, roughly chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit and grease a cookie sheet.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine walnuts, hazelnuts, lemon zest, orange zest, candied citron, chocolate pieces, currants, soaking liquid, egg yolks, and 1/4 cup sugar. Stir to combine.
3. Roll the pastry out to a 10 by 16-inch rectangle with the longest side parallel to the work surface edge.
4. Spoon the filling over the pastry evenly, leaving 2 inches uncovered at the north end.
5. Roll the pastry up like a jelly roll from south to north so it appears to be a thick pipe.
6. Make a circle of the pipe by attaching the two open ends like a wreath.
7. Brush with beaten egg yolks and sprinkle with remaining sugar.
8. Place on cookie sheet and bake for 50 minutes.
9. Allow to cool before cutting. Serve with Verduzzo wine.
Yield: 4 servings
